name: Little Millet Whole
title: Little Millet Whole
description:
Little Millet Whole – Natural & Unpolished Ancient Grain for Everyday Nutrition

Upgrade your daily meals with Little Millet Whole, a nutrient-dense ancient grain carefully sourced and minimally processed to retain its natural goodness. Known traditionally as Kutki, Samai, or Sama rice, little millet has been a staple in Indian kitchens for centuries and is now making a powerful comeback as a modern superfood.

Mimicrunch Little Millet Natural & Unpolished Whole Grain Millet is naturally gluten-free, rich in dietary fiber, and packed with essential minerals that support balanced nutrition and active lifestyles.

Unlike polished grains, this whole and unpolished millet preserves its bran layer, delivering better digestion, sustained energy, and wholesome nourishment for everyday cooking.

faqs.question: What is Little Millet Whole and how is it used?
faqs.answer: Little Millet Whole is an unprocessed ancient grain used as a healthy alternative to rice or wheat. It can be cooked for dishes like khichdi, upma, pulao, porridge, or steamed millet bowls for everyday meals.

faqs.question: Is Mimi Crunch Little Millet Whole gluten-free?
faqs.answer: Yes, Mimi Crunch Little Millet Whole is naturally gluten-free and suitable for gluten-sensitive diets. It contains no wheat, maida, or additives, making it ideal for clean eating.

faqs.question: What are the health benefits of Little Millet Whole?
faqs.answer: Little millet is rich in dietary fiber, plant-based nutrients, and essential minerals. It supports digestion, balanced energy levels, and overall daily nutrition while being light on the stomach.

faqs.question: How do I cook Little Millet Whole?
faqs.answer: Rinse the millet thoroughly and cook using a 1:2.5 millet-to-water ratio. It can be pressure cooked or simmered like rice and becomes soft and fluffy when cooked properly.

faqs.question: Is Little Millet suitable for daily meals?
faqs.answer: Yes. Little millet has a mild flavor and easy digestibility, making it ideal for regular consumption. It blends easily into traditional Indian recipes without changing taste significantly.

faqs.question: Where can I buy Little Millet Whole?
faqs.answer: You can buy premium-quality Little Millet Whole directly from the official Mimi Crunch product page : https://mimicrunch.com/products/little-millet-whole

name: Kodo Millet Flour
title: Kodo Millet Flour
description: Kodo Millet Flour is a wholesome and nutrient-rich ancient grain flour made from carefully selected, naturally grown kodo millets that are finely milled to preserve their natural nutrition and earthy flavor. Traditionally known as Kodra or Varagu, kodo millet has been part of Indian diets for centuries and is now gaining popularity as a healthier alternative to refined wheat and rice flours. Mimicrunch Kodo Millet Flour is unpolished and minimally processed, helping retain dietary fiber, plant-based protein, and essential minerals that support balanced daily nutrition. Naturally gluten-free and easy to digest, this flour is ideal for preparing rotis, dosas, pancakes, baked recipes, and traditional Indian meals while promoting sustained energy release and improved satiety. Its low glycemic nature makes it suitable for modern lifestyles focused on mindful eating and wellness. Whether you are transitioning toward millet-based cooking or simply looking for a nutritious flour option, Kodo Millet Flour offers a perfect blend of traditional goodness and modern health-conscious eating.

faqs.question: What is Kodo Millet Flour?
faqs.answer: Kodo Millet Flour is a gluten-free flour made by grinding whole Kodo millet grains. It is traditionally used in Indian cooking as a healthier alternative to refined flours.

faqs.question: Is Kodo Millet Flour gluten-free?
faqs.answer: Yes, Kodo millet is naturally gluten-free, making it suitable for people looking to reduce or avoid gluten in their diet.

faqs.question: What recipes can be made using Kodo Millet Flour?
faqs.answer: You can prepare rotis, parathas, cheelas, dosa batter, thalipeeth, pancakes, and even baked snacks using Kodo millet flour.

faqs.question: Is Kodo Millet Flour good for daily meals?
faqs.answer: Yes. Due to its fiber content and easy digestibility, it can be incorporated into daily meals as a nutritious flour replacement.

faqs.question: How should Kodo Millet Flour be stored?
faqs.answer: Store the flour in an airtight container in a cool, dry place away from moisture to maintain freshness and shelf life.

faqs.question: Where to buy Kodo Millet Flour?
faqs.answer:
You can purchase authentic Mimi Crunch Kodo Millet Flour directly from the official product page:
https://mimicrunch.com/products/kodo-millet-flour

name: Kodo Millet
title: Kodo Millet
description: Mimi Crunch Kodo Millet is a traditional, unpolished whole grain millet carefully sourced to deliver natural nutrition and authentic taste for everyday Indian meals. Rich in dietary fiber, antioxidants, and complex carbohydrates, Kodo millet serves as a wholesome alternative to polished rice while supporting balanced digestion and sustained energy release. Naturally gluten-free and minimally processed, this ancient grain retains its bran layer and essential nutrients, making it ideal for clean eating and modern wellness lifestyles. Known for its versatility, Kodo millet can be used to prepare pulao, idli, pongal, khichdi, millet rice bowls, and daily home-style recipes without compromising taste or nutrition. Sourced through farmer-first supply chains and packed with care, Mimi Crunch Kodo Millet combines traditional Indian food wisdom with contemporary health needs, helping families transition toward healthier grain choices effortlessly.

faqs.question: What is Kodo Millet?
faqs.answer: Kodo millet is an ancient Indian grain known for its high fiber content, antioxidants, and naturally gluten-free properties. It is widely used as a healthier substitute for rice in daily meals.

faqs.question: Is Kodo Millet gluten-free?
faqs.answer: Yes, Kodo millet is naturally gluten-free, making it suitable for people looking for alternative grains or gluten-free dietary options.

faqs.question: How can Kodo Millet be cooked?
faqs.answer: Kodo millet can be cooked like rice and used in dishes such as pulao, khichdi, pongal, idli batter, and millet bowls. It absorbs flavors well and cooks relatively quickly.

faqs.question: Is Kodo Millet good for everyday consumption?
faqs.answer: Yes. Due to its fiber and complex carbohydrates, Kodo millet provides steady energy and supports digestion, making it suitable for regular meals when eaten as part of a balanced diet.

faqs.question: How should Kodo Millet be stored?
faqs.answer: Store Kodo millet in an airtight container in a cool, dry place away from moisture to maintain freshness and shelf life.

faqs.question: Where to buy Little Millet Whole?
faqs.answer:
You can buy premium quality millet products directly from Mimi Crunch here:
https://mimicrunch.com/products/little-millet-whole

name: Barnyard Millet Flour
title: Barnyard Millet Flour
description: Mimi Crunch Barnyard Millet Flour is a finely stone-ground, naturally gluten-free flour made from premium quality barnyard millet, carefully processed to retain its natural fiber and nutritional goodness. Known for being light on digestion and low in calories, barnyard millet flour is an excellent choice for clean eating, fasting (vrat) meals, and everyday healthy cooking. This single-ingredient flour contains no additives or chemicals, making it suitable for rotis, cheelas, thalipeeth, snacks, and quick traditional recipes that nourish without heaviness. Its high-fiber profile helps support balanced digestion while providing sustained energy, making it ideal for modern lifestyles focused on mindful eating. Whether used during fasting days or as a healthier alternative to refined flours, Mimi Crunch Barnyard Millet Flour brings together traditional Indian nutrition and contemporary wellness in a versatile, easy-to-cook flour.

faqs.question: What is Barnyard Millet Flour?
faqs.answer: Barnyard Millet Flour is made by stone-grinding whole barnyard millet grains into a fine flour that is naturally gluten-free and easy to digest.

faqs.question: Is Barnyard Millet Flour suitable for fasting (vrat)?
faqs.answer: Yes. Barnyard millet flour is commonly used in vrat recipes because it is light, clean, and traditionally accepted for fasting meals.

faqs.question: What dishes can be prepared using Barnyard Millet Flour?
faqs.answer: You can prepare rotis, cheelas, thalipeeth, pancakes, dosa batter, and healthy snacks using barnyard millet flour.

faqs.question: Is Barnyard Millet Flour good for digestion?
faqs.answer: Yes. Barnyard millet contains dietary fiber and is known for being easy on the stomach, making it suitable for regular and light meals.

faqs.question: How should Barnyard Millet Flour be stored?
faqs.answer: Store the flour in an airtight container in a cool, dry place away from moisture and direct sunlight to maintain freshness

name: Foxtail Millet Flour
title: Foxtail Millet Flour
description: Mimi Crunch Foxtail Millet Flour is a premium stone-ground flour made from 100% natural foxtail millet, carefully processed to preserve its fiber, protein, and wholesome nutritional value. Naturally gluten-free and unrefined, this clean-label flour is designed for modern healthy kitchens seeking a nutritious alternative to refined wheat flour. Known for its low glycemic nature and easy digestibility, foxtail millet flour supports balanced energy release and fits well into diabetic-friendly and weight-conscious diets. Its soft texture and mild nutty flavor make it ideal for preparing rotis, cheelas, pancakes, thalipeeth, and healthy baked recipes without compromising taste. Free from additives and chemicals, Mimi Crunch Foxtail Millet Flour delivers traditional millet nutrition in a versatile form suitable for everyday cooking, helping families transition toward cleaner and more nourishing meals.

name: Proso Millet
title: Proso Millet
description: Mimi Crunch Proso Millet is a naturally gluten-free, whole grain millet valued for its light texture, quick cooking time, and powerful nutritional profile. Rich in plant-based protein, B-complex vitamins, fiber, and antioxidants, proso millet supports sustained energy, improved digestion, and balanced metabolism, making it an ideal grain for modern healthy lifestyles. This clean, single-ingredient millet is minimally processed to preserve its natural goodness and authentic taste, offering a wholesome alternative to polished rice and refined grains. Its mild flavor and versatility make it perfect for preparing porridge, pulao, khichdi, millet bowls, and everyday Indian meals. Carefully sourced and packed for freshness, Mimi Crunch Proso Millet combines ancient grain wisdom with contemporary nutrition, helping families adopt cleaner, lighter, and more nourishing eating habits.

Carefully sourced and minimally processed to retain its natural fiber, protein, and essential nutrients, this gluten-free millet serves as a wholesome alternative to refined grains and polished rice. Foxtail millet is valued for supporting sustained energy release and balanced eating habits, making it suitable for everyday meals and modern health-focused lifestyles. Its mild nutty flavor blends easily into traditional Indian recipes such as khichdi, pulao, upma, porridge, and millet bowls, allowing families to enjoy nutritious meals without compromising taste. Made from a single clean ingredient with no additives or preservatives, Mimi Crunch Foxtail Millet reflects the brand’s commitment to simple, natural foods designed for mindful and healthier living. Mimi Crunch millets are positioned as easy-to-digest, gluten-free grains ideal for daily nutrition and balanced diets

faqs.question: What is Foxtail Millet?
faqs.answer: Foxtail millet is an ancient whole grain millet traditionally consumed in India as a nutritious alternative to rice and refined grains. It is naturally gluten-free and easy to digest.

faqs.question: Is Foxtail Millet gluten-free?
faqs.answer: Yes, foxtail millet is naturally gluten-free, making it suitable for gluten-free diets and wheat alternatives.

faqs.question: How can Foxtail Millet be cooked?
faqs.answer: Foxtail millet can be cooked similar to rice and used in dishes like khichdi, pulao, porridge, upma, dosa batter, and healthy grain bowls.

faqs.question: Is Foxtail Millet suitable for daily consumption?
faqs.answer: Yes. Its fiber and natural nutrient profile support balanced energy and digestion, making it suitable for regular meals when included in a balanced diet.

faqs.question: How should Foxtail Millet be stored?
faqs.answer: Store the millet in an airtight container in a cool, dry place away from moisture and direct sunlight to maintain freshness.

name: Little Millet Flour
title: Little Millet Flour
description: Mimi Crunch Little Millet Flour is a premium stone-ground flour made from 100% natural little millet, carefully processed to retain its original fiber, protein, and essential nutrients. Naturally gluten-free and easy to digest, this wholesome flour serves as a nutritious alternative to refined wheat flour and supports modern clean-eating lifestyles. Little millet is valued for its balanced carbohydrate profile, dietary fiber, and plant-based nutrients that help provide sustained energy while supporting digestion and overall wellness. Its mild nutty flavor and soft texture make it highly versatile for everyday cooking, allowing you to prepare rotis, dosas, cheelas, pancakes, porridges, and healthy baked recipes without compromising taste. Free from additives and preservatives, Mimi Crunch Little Millet Flour brings traditional millet nutrition into contemporary kitchens, helping families shift toward lighter, more nourishing meals rooted in ancient grains. Millets are widely recognized for being gluten-free, fiber-rich grains that may support balanced blood sugar and digestion when included in regular diets.

faqs.question: What is Little Millet Flour?

faqs.question: What dishes can be prepared using Little Millet Flour?
faqs.answer: You can prepare rotis, dosas, cheelas, pancakes, porridge, and baked recipes using little millet flour due to its light texture and mild flavor.

faqs.question: Is Little Millet Flour suitable for daily meals?
faqs.answer: Yes. Its fiber and nutrient profile support sustained energy and digestion, making it a healthy option for everyday cooking when consumed as part of a balanced diet.

faqs.question: How should Little Millet Flour be stored?
faqs.answer: Store the flour in an airtight container in a cool, dry place away from moisture and direct sunlight to maintain freshness.

name: Ragi Flour
title: Ragi Flour
description: Mimi Crunch Ragi Flour is a premium, finely milled flour made from 100% natural finger millet (ragi), carefully processed to preserve its rich nutritional value and authentic taste. Known as one of India’s most nourishing ancient grains, ragi is naturally gluten-free and valued for its high calcium, fiber, and plant-based nutrient profile that supports strong bones, sustained energy, and balanced digestion. This wholesome flour serves as a healthy alternative to refined wheat flour, making it ideal for modern clean-eating lifestyles. With its earthy flavor and smooth texture, Mimi Crunch Ragi Flour can be used to prepare rotis, dosas, porridge, pancakes, baked recipes, and traditional Indian meals without compromising nutrition or taste. Free from preservatives and additives, the product reflects Mimi Crunch’s commitment to pure, single-ingredient foods designed for everyday family wellness. Ragi is widely recognized as an iron- and mineral-rich millet that may support bone health, digestion, and balanced blood sugar when included as part of a regular diet.

faqs.question: What is Ragi Flour?
faqs.answer: Ragi flour is made by grinding finger millet grains into a fine flour, preserving their natural nutrients, fiber, and mineral content.

faqs.question: Is Ragi Flour gluten-free?
faqs.answer: Yes, ragi is naturally gluten-free and suitable for people looking for wheat alternatives or gluten-free diets.

faqs.question: What recipes can be made using Ragi Flour?
faqs.answer: Ragi flour can be used to prepare rotis, dosa, idli, porridge, pancakes, baked goods, and traditional Indian recipes.

faqs.question: Why is Ragi Flour considered nutritious?
faqs.answer: Ragi is rich in calcium, iron, dietary fiber, and antioxidants, which help support bone health, digestion, and sustained energy levels.

faqs.question: How should Ragi Flour be stored?
faqs.answer: Store the flour in an airtight container in a cool and dry place away from moisture to maintain freshness and shelf life.

faqs.answer: You can buy premium quality Little Millet Whole directly from Mimi Crunch here:  https://mimicrunch.com/products/little-millet-whole

name: Barnyard Millet
title: Barnyard Millet
description: Barnyard Millet by MiMi Crunch is a light, naturally gluten-free ancient grain designed for clean, everyday nutrition and easy digestion. Known for its low-calorie profile and high dietary fiber content, barnyard millet is an excellent alternative to refined grains like rice and wheat, helping you enjoy wholesome meals without heaviness. Carefully sourced and processed without additives or preservatives, this millet supports balanced energy, gut comfort, and mindful eating. Its mild taste and quick cooking nature make it perfect for khichdi, upma, pulao, fasting recipes, and modern healthy bowls. Rich in plant nutrients, fiber, and essential minerals, barnyard millet fits seamlessly into diabetic-friendly, weight-management, and gluten-free lifestyles while keeping traditional Indian cooking authentic and nourishing. With MiMi Crunch’s commitment to purity and farmer-first sourcing, every grain delivers clean nutrition from ancient farms to your modern plate.

faqs.question: What is Barnyard Millet?
faqs.answer: Barnyard millet is a nutrient-rich ancient grain known for being naturally gluten-free, light on digestion, and high in dietary fiber, making it a healthy substitute for rice and wheat.

faqs.question: Is Barnyard Millet good for weight management?
faqs.answer: Yes. Barnyard millet is low in calories and high in fiber, which promotes fullness and helps support balanced eating habits.

faqs.question: Is Barnyard Millet suitable for diabetics?
faqs.answer: Barnyard millet has a low glycemic index, meaning it releases glucose slowly and helps maintain stable blood sugar levels when consumed as part of a balanced diet.

faqs.question: How can I cook Barnyard Millet?
faqs.answer: You can prepare it like rice or use it in khichdi, pulao, upma, porridge, fasting meals, and healthy grain bowls. It cooks quickly and absorbs flavors well.

faqs.question: Is Barnyard Millet gluten-free?
faqs.answer: Yes, barnyard millet is naturally gluten-free and suitable for gluten-sensitive or clean-eating diets.

name: Proso Millet Flour
title: Proso Millet Flour
description: MiMi Crunch Proso Millet Flour is a finely stone-ground, protein-rich ancient grain flour crafted to bring clean nutrition into everyday cooking. Made from 100% natural proso millet, this gluten-free flour retains its natural fiber, B-vitamins, and essential nutrients, supporting sustained energy, easy digestion, and balanced meals. Known for its low glycemic index, proso millet flour is an excellent alternative to refined wheat flour for modern healthy lifestyles. Its light texture and mild earthy flavor make it ideal for preparing soft rotis, crispy dosas, thalipeeth, pancakes, and nutritious baked recipes. Carefully processed without additives or preservatives, MiMi Crunch Proso Millet Flour helps you enjoy traditional Indian meals with a healthier twist while supporting metabolism and gut wellness. Designed for clean eating, diabetic-friendly diets, and plant-based nutrition, this flour brings the goodness of ancient grains to modern kitchens with purity and authenticity.

faqs.answer: For softer rotis, mix proso millet flour with warm water or blend it with other millet or whole-grain flours to improve texture and elasticity.
